_comment: Golden fixture for migration 020_autotune_runs_eut.sql (plan §Deliverables #4-5). Provenance: schema-derived from plan §Deliverables #1 column spec + council §3.5/§3.7. Not derived from producer output — asserts column presence, nullability, and fixture row shapes only.

new_columns.name: spec_bundle_id
new_columns.description: Soft FK to spec_bundles.bundle_hash — links the EUT study to its paired spec bundle.

new_columns.name: d_spec
new_columns.description: Bundle-distinct count of BACKTEST_SELECTION rows in researcher_dof_ledger for this bundle. S=0 for honest Phase-1.

new_columns.name: n_effective
new_columns.description: Additive haircut count N_optuna + S. When S=0: n_effective == the row's historical N_optuna.

new_columns.name: ce_metric
new_columns.description: Certainty-equivalent in return units — display-time inverse of mean(U).

new_columns.name: cvar_feasible
new_columns.description: Phase-2 surface. Phase-1: persisted NULL. No CVaR trigger path in Phase 1 (council §3.4).

new_columns.name: gamma
new_columns.description: The frozen risk-aversion parameter for this run. Not the WEALTH_ARG_FLOOR (that is a math_engine constant).

new_columns.name: lambda_budget
new_columns.description: Phase-2 only (HARDEN has no lambda; council §3.6). Phase-1: persisted NULL.

new_columns.name: paired_heuristic_study_name
new_columns.description: Lets optuna-compare diff an EUT study against its paired heuristic study by exact name.

eut_shape.description: An EUT-path autotune run row — all nine new columns populated (except Phase-2 nulls).

legacy_shape.description: A legacy autotune run row (pre-EUT, heuristic path) — all nine new columns are NULL.

h1_dual_write_contract.description: Fresh DB (init_db() only) and upgraded DB (run_migrations()) must both have all 9 columns on autotune_runs. The duplicate-column-name swallow reconciles the overlap.
